title: calorophus elongatus var. minor
intro: Calorophus elongatus var. minor, also known as Agalinis purpurea, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's roots and leaves are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, providing several health benefits such as reduced oxidative stress, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of Calorophus elongatus var. minor include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to promote wound healing and skin health.
